headline: From tip to broadcast
subhead: The five stages a story moves through before it reaches air.
source: Illustrative sample · not a real workflow

steps.title: A tip comes in
steps.description: A source, a document, or a data anomaly lands with the desk.

steps.title: Reporters verify it
steps.description: Two independent confirmations are required before anything moves forward.

steps.title: The desk builds the package
steps.description: Script, footage, and graphics come together into something a viewer reads in three seconds.

steps.title: An editor signs off
steps.description: A second set of eyes checks the claims and the framing before it locks.

steps.title: It goes to air
steps.description: The presenter walks the audience through it live, with the graphic as a guide.
